'''nolataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:keepable|keepable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-l-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:keepable|keepable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nolataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nolatithi|nolatithi]] || [[word:nolatiji|nolatiji]] || [[word:nolatishi|nolatishi]] || [[word:nolatiki|nolatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nolatuthuthu|nolatuthuthu]] || [[word:nolatujuju|nolatujuju]] || [[word:nolatushushu|nolatushushu]] || [[word:nolatukuku|nolatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nolatuthu|nolatuthu]] || [[word:nolatuju|nolatuju]] || [[word:nolatushu|nolatushu]] || [[word:nolatuku|nolatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nolatufthuf|nolatufthuf]] || [[word:nolatufjuf|nolatufjuf]] || [[word:nolatufshuf|nolatufshuf]] || [[word:nolatufkuf|nolatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nolatethe|nolatethe]] || [[word:nolateje|nolateje]] || [[word:nolateshe|nolateshe]] || [[word:nolateke|nolateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nolatothotho|nolatothotho]] || [[word:nolatojojo|nolatojojo]] || [[word:nolatoshosho|nolatoshosho]] || [[word:nolatokoko|nolatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nolatotho|nolatotho]] || [[word:nolatojo|nolatojo]] || [[word:nolatosho|nolatosho]] || [[word:nolatoko|nolatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nolatofthof|nolatofthof]] || [[word:nolatofjof|nolatofjof]] || [[word:nolatofshof|nolatofshof]] || [[word:nolatofkof|nolatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nolatÃŸfthÃŸf|nolatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nolatÃŸfjÃŸf|nolatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nolatÃŸfshÃŸf|nolatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nolatÃŸfkÃŸf|nolatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nolatÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|nolatÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nolatÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|nolatÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nolatÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|nolatÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nolatÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|nolatÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nolatÃŸfthÃŸf|nolatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nolatÃŸfjÃŸf|nolatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nolatÃŸfshÃŸf|nolatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nolatÃŸfkÃŸf|nolatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nolatÃŸfthÃŸf|nolatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nolatÃŸfjÃŸf|nolatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nolatÃŸfshÃŸf|nolatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nolatÃŸfkÃŸf|nolatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nolatÃḊthÃḊ|nolatÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:nolatÃḊjÃḊ|nolatÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:nolatÃḊshÃḊ|nolatÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:nolatÃḊkÃḊ|nolatÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nolatathatha|nolatathatha]] || [[word:nolatajaja|nolatajaja]] || [[word:nolatashasha|nolatashasha]] || [[word:nolatakaka|nolatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nolatatha|nolatatha]] || [[word:nolataja|nolataja]] || [[word:nolatasha|nolatasha]] || [[word:nolataka|nolataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nolatafthaf|nolatafthaf]] || [[word:nolatafjaf|nolatafjaf]] || [[word:nolatafshaf|nolatafshaf]] || [[word:nolatafkaf|nolatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nolatasha|nolatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nolatshÃḋsha|nolatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nolatrosha|nolatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nolatmusha|nolatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nolatyasha|nolatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonolatnkshÃḋsha|gonolatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonolatnkrosha|gonolatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonolatnkmusha|gonolatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonolatnkyasha|gonolatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nolalatasha|nolalatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nolalatshÃḋsha|nolalatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nolalatrosha|nolalatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nolalatmusha|nolalatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nolalatyasha|nolalatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonolalatnkshÃḋsha|gonolalatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonolalatnkrosha|gonolalatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonolalatnkmusha|gonolalatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonolalatnkyasha|gonolalatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nelÃḊtasha|nelÃḊtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nelÃḊtshÃḋsha|nelÃḊtshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nelÃḊtrosha|nelÃḊtrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nelÃḊtmusha|nelÃḊtmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nelÃḊtyasha|nelÃḊtyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonelÃḊtnkshÃḋsha|gonelÃḊtnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonelÃḊtnkrosha|gonelÃḊtnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonelÃḊtnkmusha|gonelÃḊtnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonelÃḊtnkyasha|gonelÃḊtnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nolfatasha|nolfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nolfatshÃḋsha|nolfatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nolfatrosha|nolfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nolfatmusha|nolfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nolfatyasha|nolfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonolfatnkshÃḋsha|gonolfatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonolfatnkrosha|gonolfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonolfatnkmusha|gonolfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonolfatnkyasha|gonolfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
